author: Alexandre Stanislawski
subject: v1.11.4
body: ## [1.11.4](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.11.3...v1.11.4) (2017-03-29) ### Bug Fixes * **autoHideContainer:** dont prevent render with `shouldComponentUpdate` (#2076) ([b520400](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/b520400)) * **star-rating:** make max value inclusive ([f5fc41c](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f5fc41c)), closes [#2002](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2002)
